title: Pan-Seared Borek with Mushrooms
description: A delicious Turkish-inspired dish featuring crispy borek pastry filled with sautéed mushrooms. Perfect as a snack or light lunch.
instructions: Unroll the borek pastry and cut into 6 equal squares.
In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Place a spoonful of the mushroom mixture onto one half of each pastry square.
Brush the edges with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles and press the edges to seal.
Place the borek on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
